### Geocoding
| API | Description | Auth | HTTPS | CORS |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [adresse.data.gouv.fr](https://adresse.data.gouv.fr) | France geocoding support | No | YES | Unkown |
| [Mashape Legacy](https://legacy.example.com/docs) | Legacy key type regression | X-Mashape-Key | YES | Unknown |
| [Header Source](https://header.example.com/api) | Header auth regression | User-Agent | Yes | Yes |
| [Trailing Pipe API](https://trail.example.com/docs) | Trailing pipe row support | apiKey | Yes | No ||
